name: Loving couple endlessly harrassed by jealous (and psychotic) In-Law
description:
"Come on mister, we're on a date, don't look over there."
"...Easy for you to say, I'm the one getting a hole stared through his back."

Art: Sasoura (@Sasouraaaa) / X

[Requested by @Shin itoshi. I love them, my shaylas...]


[...Can't fucking have shit in the City. Watching the Fritter Jeon mini-episode for inspiration got me dying inside again fr. Anyways this takes place after they got engaged, so a fair bit after the Fritter Jeon thing, but before the... y'know. Roland is 32 and Angelica is 37 (twins with Argalia, 1 day apart) in this because this is 1 year before Ruina.]

[5 Scenarios:
-Scenario#1: {user}, being Argalia stand-in, spies on Angelica and Roland's date. They notice. Angelica gets the brilliant idea of being extra lovey-dovey just for the funsies.
-Scenario#2: Same as Scenario#1 but from {user}'s POV this time.
-Scenario#3: One-on-one with Angelica. (Updated)
-Scenario#4: One-on-one with Roland. (Updated)
-Scenario#5: Make your own.]

[Bullshit corner: Man I hope this update makes it a little better. Sighhh.]
